name: Lit Easter Decorative Blow Mold Egg Yellow - Spritz™
description:
Brighten up your Easter decor with this cheerful Lit Easter Decorative Blow Mold Egg Yellow - Spritz™. Crafted from durable plastic, this piece is perfect for sheltered outdoor displays or indoor settings. Standing at a height of 9.84 inches, it features charming flat details that add a playful touch to your seasonal arrangements. Lightweight at just 0.735 pounds, it's easy to move and position wherever a touch of seasonal whimsy is desired.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
